pages.title: Hello World
pages.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: 在Linux服务器间快速传输大型文件
posts.text: Transport large file between servers Sometimes we need to back up data from a server to another using scp or rsync. It is very time-consuming when the data is very large, for example, over 500G. I found a combined command that helped me a lot. Steps1. Split your file into small pieces1split -b 1G large_file.txt.gz large_file/large_file.txt.gz.part- -b for bytes and -n for number of lines. 2. Transport the small pieces using scp1scp large_file/large_file.txt.gz.part-* user@xx.xx.xx:/path/of/destination or you can transport multiple files in a meanwhile. I prefer using multiple threading from Python. 3. Merge the small pieces to the original file1cat large_file.txt.gz.part-* > large_file.txt.gz Finished. You can check the MD5 value and even the tabix index is still working. PSIn my case, speed of transporting once a file is 2M/s, while it’s around 10M/s when I scp 8 files simultaneously. However, you should add the public key to the remote server, (see here for detail), and nohup will block up the processes.

posts.title: 使用ShapeIT2进行单倍型分型
posts.text: Phasing with ShapeIT2Two ways to phase (for unrelated individuals without family information) Phasing with a reference panel Phasing without a reference panel Input file: VCF including variant information of many samplesSplit VCF file by chromosomes12345678vcftools --gzvcf chinese-han.phase3.genotypes.vcf.gz \ --chr 22 \ --recode \ --recode-INFO-all \ --remove-filtered-all \ --min-alleles 2 \ --max-alleles 2 \ --out chinese_chr22 Phasing without a reference panel1234shapeit --input-vcf gwas.vcf \ -M genetic_map.txt \ -O gwas.phased \ -T 4 Phasing with a reference panel(1000G)1. Check SNP between INPUT and REF PANEL1234567shapeit -check \ --input-vcf test_chr22.recode.vcf \ -M ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/genetic_map_chr22_combined_b37.txt \ --input-ref ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3_chr22.hap.gz \ ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3_chr22.legend.gz \ ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3.sample \ --output-log test_chr22.alignments OUTPUT: .strand .strand.exclude 2. Phase wirh REF (exclude SNPs in .strand.exclude)12345678shapeit --input-vcf test_chr22.recode.vcf \ -M ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/genetic_map_chr22_combined_b37.txt \ --input-ref ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3_chr22.hap.gz \ ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3_chr22.legend.gz \ ~/one_thousand_genome/1000GP_Phase3/1000GP_Phase3.sample \ -O test_chr22.phased.with.ref \ --exclude-snp test_chr22.alignments.snp.strand.exclude \ -T 4 3. Convert Phase Output to Impute2 Input123shapeit -convert \ --input-haps test_chr22.phased.with.ref \ --output-ref test_chr22.phased.hap test_chr22.phased.leg test_chr22.phased.sample

posts.title: TOP/BOT Strand and A/B Allele
posts.text: “TOP/BOT” Strand and “A/B” AlleleRather than referencing the evolving public databases to provide accurate SNP strand and orientation, Illumina has developed a method to consistently designate SNPs based on the actual or contextual sequence of each individual SNP.The advantage of this method is that it will consistently designate the same SNP orientation and allele calls even if public SNP databases and genome assemblies change. This will enable researchers worldwide to easily correlate the genotype calls made today to research that may have been completed several years ago. A in Candidate allele: TOP T in Candidate allele: BOT sequence walkingIf the SNP is an [A/T] or a [C/G], then the above rules do not apply. To designate Strand, when the A or T in the first unambiguous pair is on the 5’ side of the SNP, then the sequence is designated TOP. When the A or T in the first unambiguous pair is on the 3’ side of the SNP, then the sequence is designated BOT. To designate Allele for an [A/T] SNP, when the Strand is TOP then Allele A = A and Allele B = T. When the Strand is BOT, then Allele A = T and Allele B =A. To designate Allele for a [C/G] SNP, when the Strand is TOP then Allele A = C and Allele B = G. When the Strand is BOT then Allele A = G and Allele B = C.

posts.title: Git快速入门
posts.text: 安装 GitFor Linux: 1sudo apt-get install git 安装完成后，还需要最后一步设置，在命令行输入： 12$ git config --global user.name "Your Name"$ git config --global user.email "email@example.com" –global参数表示你这台机器上所有的Git仓库都会使用这个配置，当然也可以对某个仓库指定不同的用户名和Email地址。 创建版本库 (本地)123$ mkdir learngit$ cd learngit$ git init 当前目录下多了一个.git的目录，这个目录是Git来跟踪管理版本库的，没事千万不要手动修改这个目录里面的文件，不然改乱了，就把Git仓库给破坏了。也不一定必须在空目录下创建Git仓库，选择一个已经有东西的目录也是可以的。 添加文件到版本库第一步，创建文件，把文件放入你的git过的目录下：文件内容示例： 12Git is a version control system.Git is free software. 第二步，用命令git add告诉Git，把文件添加到仓库：1$ git add readme.txt 第三步，用命令git commit告诉Git，把文件提交到仓库：1$ git commit -m "wrote a readme file" git commit命令-m后面输入的是本次提交的说明，可以输入任意内容，当然最好是有意义的，这样你就能从历史记录里方便地找到改动记录。 commit可以一次提交很多文件，所以你可以多次add不同的文件，比如： 123$ git add file1.txt$ git add file2.txt file3.txt$ git commit -m "add 3 files." 更改文件并提交更改 修改文件： 12Git is a distributed version control system.Git is free software. 运行git status命令看看结果： 1$ git status 提交修改并说明 12$ git add readme.txt$ git commit -m "add distributed" 用git diff可以查看修改内容。 123456789$ git diff readme.txt diff --git a/readme.txt b/readme.txtindex 46d49bf..9247db6 100644--- a/readme.txt+++ b/readme.txt@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@-Git is a version control system.+Git is a distributed version control system. Git is free software. 远程库（GitHub）现在的情景是，本地创建了一个Git仓库后，再在GitHub创建一个Git仓库，并且让这两个仓库进行远程同步，GitHub上的仓库既可以作为备份，又可以让其他人通过该仓库来协作。 第1步：创建SSH Key在用户主目录下，看看有没有.ssh目录，如果有，再看看这个目录下有没有id_rsa和id_rsa.pub这两个文件，如果已经有了，可直接跳到下一步。如果没有，创建SSH Key： 1$ ssh-keygen -t rsa -C "youremail@example.com" 你需要把邮件地址换成你自己的邮件地址，然后一路回车，使用默认值即可，由于这个Key也不是用于军事目的，所以也无需设置密码。 如果一切顺利的话，可以在用户主目录里找到.ssh目录，里面有id_rsa和id_rsa.pub两个文件，这两个就是SSH Key的秘钥对，id_rsa是私钥，不能泄露出去，id_rsa.pub是公钥，可以放心地告诉任何人。 第2步：登陆GitHub 登陆GitHub，打开“Account settings”，“SSH Keys”页面，然后点“Add SSH Key”，填上任意Title，在Key文本框里粘贴id_rsa.pub文件的内容； 然后，在右上角找到“Create a new repo”按钮，创建一个新的仓库； 在Repository name填入learngit，其他保持默认设置，点击“Create repository”按钮，就成功地创建了一个新的Git仓库； 把一个已有的本地仓库与之关联 现在，我们根据GitHub的提示，在本地的git仓库下运行命令： 12$ git remote add origin git@github.com:michaelliao/learngit.git$ git push -u origin master 从现在起，只要本地作了提交，就可以通过命令：5. 把本地仓库的内容推送到GitHub仓库； 1$ git push origin master 从远程库克隆到本地1$ git clone git@github.com:michaelliao/gitskills.git 版本回顾git log 123456789101112$ git logcommit e475afc93c209a690c39c13a46716e8fa000c366Author: Michael Liao <askxuefeng@gmail.com>Date: Fri May 18 21:03:36 2018 +0800 add distributedcommit eaadf4e385e865d25c48e7ca9c8395c3f7dfaef0Author: Michael Liao <askxuefeng@gmail.com>Date: Fri May 18 20:59:18 2018 +0800 wrote a readme file 长串的字母和数字是commit ID（版本号），可以使用git reset命令回退到之前的版本： 12$ git reset --hard HEAD^HEAD is now at e475afc add distributed HEAD表示当前版本，上一个版本就是HEAD^，上上一个版本就是HEAD^^，当然往上100个版本写100个^比较容易数不过来，所以写成HEAD~100。==回退之后git log就不再显示当前版本之后的版本信息==可以通过指定commit ID来回到之后的版本： 12$ git reset --hard 1094aHEAD is now at 83b0afe append GPL 在Git中，删除也是一个修改操作: 12345678910$ rm test.txt$ git statusOn branch masterChanges not staged for commit: (use "git add/rm <file>..." to update what will be committed) (use "git checkout -- <file>..." to discard changes in working directory) deleted: test.txtno changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a") 简单多人协作1. 建立本地库和远程库方法见上述 2. 同步远程版本到本地修改前拉取最新版本，防止冲突 1$ git pull 3. 修改代码并提交12$ git add file$ git commmit -m "commit" 4. 同步本地修改到远程1$ git push

posts.title: iPhone SE, to buy or not to buy?
posts.text: iPhone SE, to buy or not to buy?可能是看不下去各个营销号的难看吃相，库存克星终于在四月15号半夜在官网上线了新的iPhone SE。在iPhone8的基础上升级了芯片和内存，售价在各电商平台补贴之后几乎是iPhone8发售价的一半，在安卓阵营全线5G的时间节点，这款手机的热度甚至比一些线上发布会推出的安卓机型还要高。讨论的主要关注点无非就是是否有必要花三千块钱买一款小屏4G苹果手机。 那么这看手机到底值不值得买呢？作为一个iPhone7用户，我认真思考的结果是：值得。 Ps：以下内容都是在家境贫寒的前提下的讨论，不适合不差钱的同学们，不差钱的同学也不需要看任何评论。 个人背景首先说一下我的日常设备： 14年MacBook Pro，半年前一直是主力机，修过一次就开始转为用实验室的Windows了，不过也还是经常拿来写文档和代码； 17款iPad，主要用来看视频和看书，偶尔玩玩游戏； iPhone7，用来扫码和看资讯； Apple Watch S4，主要用来收女朋友的消息； 耳机就不算了。 所以我算是被iCloud生态绑定的人，而且很长一段时间我都没有用过安卓和windows，所以当我考虑换新设备的时候，我还是把苹果设备作为首选。 苹果和安卓的差距近年来安卓手机不管是硬件和软件上都有很大的进步，五千预算闭着眼睛选iPhone的日子已经一去不复返了，但是从市场来看，苹果和安卓之间仍然存在差距。硬件上，A系列芯片碾压所有其他芯片；软件上，iOS用起来比安卓省心很多。甚至有很多苹果和安卓都有的功能在安卓手机就是差点意思，比如线性马达，非线性动画还有简单强大的App Store。 由于这次疫情，我有机会和爸妈在一起待了很长时间，也有机会体验安卓手机，他们的手机都是我帮他们挑的，我爸用的mate30，我妈用的小米note3。虽然都不是旗舰也不是最新的机型，但对于我一个不玩游戏不打算参加摄影比赛的人来说，硬件始终不是我换手机时的最先考虑（因为要考虑价格），系统使用是否舒适才是最能打动我的地方。事实也是如此，我十分惊讶的发现2400元买的小米note3在用了三年之后仍然丝毫不卡，相比之下我两倍价钱买的iPhone7却因为电池损耗连微信语音都会闪退，但是我还是不会用mi UI作为主力机，因为那上面的广告实在太多了。至于华为EMUI，这里出现了一个小插曲，我给我爸设置了手机FNC刷公交地铁并且教过他怎么充值，但是过了几天他又来问我在哪里充值，结果我也找不到充值入口，原因是手机上有两个叫“钱包“的app，而我试了几遍的app里面没有卡包这个选项，真的是十分无语，我还觉得我爸是不是老了记性变差了。似乎在安卓系统上这样的点有很多，安卓手机上有很多个应用商店，而且还都不是最全的；解锁的方式也有人脸和指纹两种，看上去很贴心实际上我爸用的时候很不方便；文件管理更是一团糟，相册里面五花八门。总的来说，目前我仍然觉得EMUI，Mi UI和iOS比起来，iOS突出一个省心，更别谈和iCloud生态比了（macOS和Windows比就有先天优势），我相信国产厂商的硬件能力，但是软件体验赶上iCloud生态仍然需要不少时间。 iPhone SE的目标人群很多人都说适合iPhone SE的人群有三类： 老iPhone6/6s/7/8的用户，日常使用损耗需要更新设备； 给中老年人准备，图个放心； 想体验iOS的安卓用户。 当然这三条都要加上预算有限。但是在我看来其实最最主要的还是第一类人群，因为小屏幕实在不适合字体都要调到最大的中老年人，也不适合习惯了大屏的安卓用户。甚至还有人说这款手机是给那些喜欢小屏旗舰的人准备的，首先这款用来清库存的手机不是旗舰，其次iPhone 11 Pro绝对可以称得上小屏旗舰，便宜点的iPhone Xs或者有锁机也都可以，但也要4500+。A13确实是一个很大的卖点，但是实际上是一个“噱头”，这个强大的芯片可能在11 pro max上都没有发挥所有潜力，在这么小的机身里面完全是大材小用。这款手机真正的卖点是超低价，全新的硬件，iOS和3G的RAM，而真正懂它的人正是像我们这样了解且离不开iOS却囊中羞涩的人。 iPhone SE的缺点iPhone SE的优点前面说过了，超低价格使用崭新硬件和iOS，3G RAM和64G ROM保证基本的日常需求。 而随之而来的缺点也称为了许多人按下支付按钮的障碍： 1. 硬件技术落后这一点其实不算缺点，因为2800的价格在安卓机上好像也体验不到什么一线技术，甚至没几个三千一下的安卓手机支持无线充电。但是可能出现的一点是，在坐公交或者坐地铁时，你会发现你的古董外观的手机被一堆全面屏外观的手机包围了，爱面子的人可能会不舒服，不过据我观察，我们这类“古董群体”并不孤独。 2. 没有5G我觉得这也不算缺点，至少现在5G还没有平民化，甚至和超高拍照水平一样是厂商口中的卖点，并没有在实质上改善用户的体验。而两年或者三年之后，5G落地开花之时，个人用户再来考虑5G也不迟。 3. 续航差小屏手机的续航肯定是很差的，而且会随着电池的损耗越来越差，这样就陷入了续航差➡️充电次数多➡️电池损耗➡️续航更差的恶性循环。但是这不是小屏iPhone的问题，事实上，其他任何配置，价位的iPhone都存在这样的问题，不光是续航差，iPhone的散热也都很差，这样在厉害的芯片也发挥不出真实的实力，甚至Mac也有这样的问题。所以续航在iPhone用户这里就是一个伪命题，不过解决的方法也很简单，就是带充电宝和换电池。相反，我倒是认为最明智的选择是，用买iPhone 11的钱买一个SE和一个iPad，这样既能体验完善的生态，又能享受大屏和完美续航。 体验为王完美的产品是不存在的，消费者的选择策略无非是在自己能负担的前提下选择最适合自己的，然后再看它的缺点自己是否能够接受，以达到最好的购买和使用体验。而随着产品的损耗它的缺点可能就会显现出来，直到你无法适应的时候，你就会开始种草新产品。三年前我把手中的6折价换了7，因为6的RAM实在太小，我无法接受每次进微信都要等待四五秒，而现在我因为7的空间不够用又开准备换手机了。当然人也是会变的，比如半年前因为Mac开不了机，我被迫开始使用Windows，经过一段时间的适应之后，我竟然开始觉得Windows也是不错的选择，甚至有些体验比Mac要好，比如Mac同一程序的窗口无法用cmd+tab切换。不管预算多少，花钱当然是希望获得尽可能多的好的体验，别人用什么说什么是别人的事，非要把这么简单的事情上升到信仰人品，真的没意义。

posts.title: Windows科学上网方法
posts.text: 科学上网（俗称翻墙）的方式有很多种，包括自己搭梯子、购买搭好的梯子和使用免费的梯子。 对于大多数人来说，选择一种经济实惠又不折腾的方法是很关键的，下面我就我科学上网的一些经验来谈谈如何选择合适的方式。 一句话总结掌握多种科学上网方式以保证随时的上网需求；免费的方式省钱但费点力，付费的方式花钱但省心还可以在IOS设备上使用；免费方式推荐浏览器插件：SetupVPN，付费方式推荐购买Shadowsocks账号。 免费方式👴不是没有钱，👴就喜欢这种薅羊毛的感觉 爬虫抓取免费账号常见的免费方式就是使用爬虫抓取免费socks账号，有能力的可以自己抓或者使用别人的程序，别人Po在网上的往往是无效的，自己抓的也很难坚持很长时间。所以我不推荐这种方式。 如果非要用socks账号进行科学上网的话，点这里可以找到靠谱的免费SSR账号，基本上每天都会更新，因为经常会被封锁。 使用免费软件免费软件这样的软件有几个比如：lantern 和freegate Lantern 要比Freegate好用一点，但是有一点比较头疼的是，GFW会在某些特殊时期加强，这时候这两个软件都没有办法发挥作用。 免费浏览器插件我在Windows上主要使用Chrome，所以在这里推荐几款Chrome上的科学上网插件。 SetupVPN 是一款浏览器插件，无法配置自动代理，网速一般，但是免费。能翻墙就直接在浏览器应用商店搜索安装， 无法翻墙有两种方法： 下载插件文件安装 下载Chrome插件crx文件，http://www.chajianmi.com/download/oofgbpoabipfcfjapgnbbjjaenockbdp 将下载文件的后缀名改成zip或者rar，然后解压 进入Chrome扩展程序管理页面，打开右上角开发者模式 将解压的文件夹拖该页面安装即可 尝试蓝灯翻墙 蓝灯有的时候可以短暂的翻墙，有的时候完全不行。运气好的话连接成功就可以在Chrome上登入你的Google账户，这样你之前安装过的插件都会被同步过来，如果你没有安装过setupVPN也可以通过商店安装。 谷歌上网助手 不像SetupVPN，这款插件只能访问部分google的服务，可以使用google搜索引擎，Gmail和google scholar，但是不能上YouTube，Twitter等非google网站更是不用说了。不过好在这个插件速度明显要比SetupVPN要快，所以非常适合国内的科研人员。还有一点不容忽视，即SetupVPN无法自动代理，因此在访问很多国内的网站的时候很慢甚至无法加载，而谷歌上网助手就没有这个问题。 我一般是同时安装这两个插件根据不同的上网需求切换着用，最近好像SSR被封的特别厉害，反倒这些免费的方式成了最靠谱的方法了。 安装方法参照setupVPN的安装方法，能下载到crx就解压后拖到Chrome里，下载不到就想办法先翻墙，在Chrome应用商店里面下载。 付费方式这时是不是有人就要问：既然免费的方法这么香，还要花钱折腾付费的干嘛？不是花钱找罪受吗？ 花钱找罪受是不假。然而我们前面提到的免费的Chrome插件虽然方便省钱，但是很多时候却是满足不了我们的需求。比如我们需要全局代理而不只是在Chrome上翻墙，最常见的例子就是邮件客户端登陆Gmail，又或者MacOS用户只习惯用Safari，不喜欢流氓软件Chrome。更重要的是付费购买的梯子不只是可以在PC上科学上网，移动设备同样也可以。 现在付费的方式主要分两种，一种是自己搭建服务器，一种是购买别人搭建好的服务器上的账号。当然我们前面说的免费的软件和插件都有付费升级的选项，不推荐的原因有两个，一是贵，二是有前面说的局限性。 自建服务器也就是常说的VPS(Virtual Private Server)。原理就是租一台在海外的服务器，然后在上面搭建代理服务。我没有试过，原因是被价格全退了，基本上要20刀+/年，现在好像还在涨。因为没有试过，所以我不知道这种方式的速度如何以及会不会被封锁，封锁了之后怎么办。不过感觉我也不会尝试。 购买账号这个是我推荐的也是我正在使用的。 shadowsocks，俗称小飞机。我用了快一年半了，下面是我总结的小飞机的优点和缺点。 优点： 便宜。我买的是入门版，96RMB/年，双十一的时候还有活动三年只需两年的价格。每个月60G流量根本用不完，而且我怀疑他的流量计算有问题，我基本上每天都看YouTube，但是每个月的流量都不超过1G。 方便。Mac，Windows，iPhone，iPad都可以用。自动代理和全局代理随意切换。 省事。虽然现在动不动就被封禁，但是人家毕竟是靠这个赚钱的，所以每次被封禁都会第一时间想办法解决，还会有一定的补偿。之前是只支持SSR，去年下半年遭到长时间封禁之后有支持了v2ray，现在又在尝试支持trojan。 缺点： 不稳定。因为用户群体数量大，所以成为了每次封禁首当其冲的对象。不知道新的trojan会不会好一点。 使用方式1. 购买账号购买链接：https://portal.shadowsocks.nl/cart.php 使用我的推荐链接可以便宜一点，具体便宜多少我也不知道。 2. 安装客户端Windows的客户端有两个：shadowscocks和v2ray。shadowsocks只支持SSR，不支持v2ray，v2ray都支持。 网上的一些教程说还要安装SwithyOmega的插件。个人觉得完全没有必要，而且这个插件也不好用。 shadowscocks在GitHub上下载最新的(不是最新的可能不支持你的加密方式)客户端，https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/releases。双击安装然后登陆账号就可以了。 v2ray从github下载v2ray内核 https://github.com/v2ray/v2ray-core/releases 再下载图形界面 https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN/releases/ 将图形界面文件解压移动到内核文件内运行v2rayN.exe即可。 最后祝大家都能够省心地科学上网。

posts.title: GATK Best Practices
posts.text: GATK Best Practices Contents Data Pre-processing Germline SNPs + Indels (single sample) Germline SNPs + Indels (cohort) Data Pre-processingPurposeThe is the obligatory first phase that must precede all variant discovery. It involves pre-processing the raw sequence data (provided in FASTQ format) to produce analysis-ready BAM files. This involves alignment to a reference genome as well as some data cleanup operations to correct for technical biases and make the data suitable for analysis. InputFASTQ format, Compressed or uncompressed, single end or paired end. I used a small fragment (chr2:204300000-205000000) of a NGS data as the sample data (test_1.fq.gz and test_2.fq.gz in input folder). OutputBAM file and its index file ready for variant discovery ToolsMinimap2 (aligner), SAMtools, GATK BWA has been commonly-used for alignment and recommended by GATK for years. But its developer Heng Li has developed a utralfast software called minimap2. So I switched from BWA to minimap2 in the following pipeline. GATK is updated very frequently, while the latest version is not always the most suitable version, as updates not only include new features but also contain bugs. In this pipeline, I used version 4.1.3.0. Since GATK has many Python dependcies and both Minimap2 and SAMtools can be installed by Conda, it’s quite simple and friendly for version control to install by creating conda environment. Run set_up.sh in bin folder will set up the environment automatically. 12# anaconda installedbash -i 00_set_up.sh ReferenceGATK has constructed several series of reference files stored in GATK bundle. It’s up to you to choose which series for reference panel, b37, b36, hg18, hg19, or hg38. But it’s necessary to use same series in both pre-processing and variant discovery. For example, b37 and hg19 belongs to the same Genome Build, however, the representation of chorosomes in these two series are different, b37 doesn’t have the ‘chr’ prefix. GATK bundle doesn’t contain the index files of fasta file, as the index created by distinct tools are different. I use the b37 series as reference panel and have indexed the fasta file already. You can see them in reference folder. We don’t need every file in the GATK bundle, below are files needed in this pipeline. Download and decompressed them (GATK cannot recognize .gz files). 123456789101000G_omni2.5.hg19.sites.vcf.gz1000G_omni2.5.hg19.sites.vcf.idx.gzdbsnp_138.hg19.vcf.gzdbsnp_138.hg19.vcf.idx.gzMills_and_1000G_gold_standard.indels.hg19.sites.vcf.gzMills_and_1000G_gold_standard.indels.hg19.sites.vcf.idx.gz1000G_phase1.snps.high_confidence.hg19.sites.vcf.gz1000G_phase1.snps.high_confidence.hg19.sites.vcf.idx.gzhapmap_3.3.hg19.sites.vcf.gzhapmap_3.3.hg19.sites.vcf.idx.gz 01_prepare_reference.sh in reference folder can prepare the reference needed in pipeline. Usage1234567891011# set upcd binbash 00_set_up.sh# prepare referencecd ../referencebash 01_prepare_reference.sh# data pre-processingcd ../binbash 01_pre-processing.sh ../input/test_1.fq.gz ../input/test_2.fq.gz test Main stepsThe pipeline provided by GATK was written in WDL, which started from unmapped BAM (uBAM) format. Considering complexity of WDL and readability, I wrote this pipeiline in Shell which was a splice of several commands actually. There are 4 steps in this pipeline. See below for details. 1. Align123456minimap2 \-t minimap2_threads \-R '@RG\tID:'${sample}'\tSM:'${sample}'\tLB:'${sample}'\tPL:Illumina' \-ax sr \../reference/human_g1k_v37.fasta.mmi $fq1 $fq2 | \samtools view -S -b - > ./$sample/${sample}.bam -R '@RG\tID:'${sample}'\tSM:'${sample}'\tLB:'${sample}'\tPL:Illumina' means adding read group label to output file, which is required by GATK. AddOrReplaceReadGroups in GATK can the same thing, either. The read group in BAM file looks like: 1@RG ID:test SM:test LB:test PL:Illumina And the output file was piped to samtools view to store in BAM format. 2. Sort1samtools sort -@ $sort_threads -m $sort_memory -O bam -o ./${sample}/${sample}.sorted.bam ./${sample}/${sample}.bam As the order of reads in the output of alignment is the order in the raw fastq files, we should sort them by the position on genome for further analysis. Turn up the -@ and -m can speed up. 3. Mark duplicates1234567$GATK \MarkDuplicates \-I ./${sample}/${sample}.sorted.bam \-O ./${sample}/${sample}.markdup.bam \-M ./${sample}/${sample}.markdup_metrics.txt$samtools index ./${sample}/${sample}.markdup.bam :bangbang:There shouldn’t be any extra space in GATK command line. If you are running out of memory, try reducing the value of -SORTING_COLLECTION_SIZE_RATIO which is 0.25 by defualt. Why mark duplicates?During the library construction of NGS, PCR is one the significant steps which may yeild bias. PCR bias has many resources such as mismatching in PCR and the preference of PCR. To make sure the accuracy of variant calling, we need remove the duplicated reads made by PCR. You can use samtools flagstat to inspect how many duplicated reads are in the data. 1234567891011121314samtools flagstat test.markdup.bam 43961 + 0 in total (QC-passed reads + QC-failed reads)0 + 0 secondary155 + 0 supplementary58 + 0 duplicates43884 + 0 mapped (99.82% : N/A)43806 + 0 paired in sequencing21903 + 0 read121903 + 0 read243512 + 0 properly paired (99.33% : N/A)43652 + 0 with itself and mate mapped77 + 0 singletons (0.18% : N/A)2 + 0 with mate mapped to a different chr1 + 0 with mate mapped to a different chr (mapQ>=5) There were 58 duplicated reads detected by GATK and GATK did not remove them. As the module’s name, MarkDuplicates, the duplicated reads was marked by the flag (see SAM format for details). 4. BQSR (Base Quality Score Recalibration)1234567891011121314$GATK \BaseRecalibrator \-R $REF/human_g1k_v37.fasta \-I ./${sample}/${sample}.markdup.bam \--known-sites $REF/dbsnp_138.b37.vcf \--known-sites $REF/Mills_and_1000G_gold_standard.indels.b37.vcf \-O ./${sample}/${sample}.recal_data.table$GATK \ApplyBQSR \-R $REF/human_g1k_v37.fasta \-I ./${sample}/${sample}.markdup.bam \-bqsr ./${sample}/${sample}.recal_data.table \-O ${OUTPUT}/${sample}.markdup.bqsr.bam There are two steps in BQSR. First, generates recalibration table based on varioususer-specified covariates (such as read group, reported quality score, machine cycle, and nucleotide context). The known polymorphic sites are used to exclude regions around known polymorphisms from analysis. Then, apply a linear base quality recalibration model trained with the BaseRecalibrator tool. This is the lastest step of data pre-processing that detects systematic errors made by the sequencer when it estimates the quality score of each base call. Typically, the quality scores of bases are overrated. As this is a manul of pipeline, I won’t talk too much about base recalibration here. And the technical details of BQSR can be found here. Germline SNPs + Indels (single sample) The main variant caller in GATK is HaplotypeCaller which has two modes, one for single sample and another for cohort sample. It’s quite easy to select mode, if your have only one sample, use single sample mode, if not, use cohort mode (Joint call). Above is the new pipeline from GATK developed for single sample which involves deep learning is variants qaulity control. InputAnalysis-Ready Reads (BAM format as well as its index, output of pre-processing) OutputA variant information file (VCF) contains SNPs and Indels, along with its index Usage123# run 02_germline_snv_single_sample.sh and specify the bam file and sample namecd binbash -i 02_germline_snv_single_sample.sh ../output/test.markdup.bqsr.bam test Main steps1. HaplotypeCaller123456$GATK \HaplotypeCaller \-I $bam \-R $REF/human_g1k_v37.fasta \-D $REF/dbsnp_138.b37.vcf \-O ${sample}/${sample}.HC.vcf Call germline SNPs and indels via local re-assembly of haplotypes. Even in cohort mode, HaplotypeCaller is ran for once a sample, but in the ‘GVCF’ mode. I will describe it later. Wit this HMM tool, we got the initial output of short variation discovery. And a few QC steps are needed for high confidence. 2. Annotate with CNNscore1234567$GATK \CNNScoreVariants \-I $bam \-V ${sample}/${sample}.HC.vcf \-R $REF/human_g1k_v37.fasta \-O ${sample}/${sample}.HC.CNNscore.vcf \-tensor-type read_tensor Annotate a VCF with scores from a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). This tool streams variants and their reference context to a python program, which evaluates a pre-trained neural network on each variant. 2D models convolve over aligned reads as well as the reference sequence, and variant annotations. 2D models require a SAM/BAM file as input and for the –tensor-type argument to be set to a tensor type which requires reads, as in the command above. The annotated CNN_2D item looks like: 12#CHROM POS ID REF ALT QUAL FILTER INFO FORMAT test2 204300244 . TAA T 139.10 PASS AC=2;AF=1.00;AN=2;CNN_2D=5.774;DP=4;ExcessHet=3.0103;FS=0.000;MLEAC=2;MLEAF=1.00;MQ=60.00;QD=34.77;SOR=0.693 GT:AD:DP:GQ:PL 1/1:0,4:4:12:153,12,0 3. Apply tranche filtering123456789$GATK \FilterVariantTranches \-V ${sample}/${sample}.HC.CNNscore.vcf \-O ${OUTPUT}/${sample}.HC.CNNscore.filtered.vcf \-resource $REF/hapmap_3.3.b37.vcf \-resource $REF/1000G_omni2.5.b37.vcf \-resource $REF/1000G_phase1.snps.high_confidence.b37.vcf \-resource $REF/dbsnp_138.b37.vcf \-resource $REF/Mills_and_1000G_gold_standard.indels.b37.vcf Apply tranche filtering to VCF based on scores from an annotation in the INFO field. The annotation can come from the CNNScoreVariants tool (CNNLOD), VQSR (VQSLOD), or any other variant scoring tool which adds numeric annotations in a VCF’s INFO field. Tranches are specified in percent sensitivity to the variants in the resource files. The default tranche filtering threshold for SNPs is 99.95 and for INDELs it is 99.4. You can custom the traches by --snp-tranche and --indel-tranche. In our sample data, 4 SNPs out of 561 and 3 indels out of 201 were filtered. 119:53:04.160 INFO FilterVariantTranches - Filtered 4 SNPs out of 561 and filtered 3 indels out of 201 with INFO score: CNN_2D. 4. Functional annotateThere are many annotation tools, online or offline. GATK has its own annotator called Funcotator. I didn’t include this part in the pipeline and if you are interested in Funcotator, see the tutorial of Funcotator. Germline SNPs + Indels (cohort)To be added :smile: Somatic SNPs + IndelsWithout matched normal sampleStep 1. Run Mutect2 in tumor-only mode for each normal sample.Note that as of May, 2019 -max-mnp-distance must be set to zero to avoid a bug in GenomicsDBImport. 1gatk Mutect2 -R reference.fasta -I normal1.bam -max-mnp-distance 0 -O normal1.vcf.gz Step 2. Create a GenomicsDB from the normal Mutect2 calls.12345gatk GenomicsDBImport -R reference.fasta -L intervals.interval_list \--genomicsdb-workspace-path pon_db \-V normal1.vcf.gz \-V normal2.vcf.gz \-V normal3.vcf.gz Step 3. Combine the normal calls using CreateSomaticPanelOfNormals.1gatk CreateSomaticPanelOfNormals -R reference.fasta -V gendb://pon_db -O pon.vcf.gz With matched normal sampleThe Broad recommended number of samples for creation of a PoN is 40 samples.

posts.title: Win10 挂载远程linux
posts.text: Windows的SFTP软件有很多， 为了在Windows下查看远程linux服务器文件并修改脚本，我试过很多种方法： mobaxterm，虽然功能很多可以编辑文件，但是第一界面不好看，第二分屏体验很差，已经习惯了用terminal的我没有办法适应这个软件。 SSHFS-Win + WinFSP: https://codeyarns.com/2018/05/03/how-to-mount-remote-directory-on-windows-using-sshfs-win/ 我不知道别人有没有成功，反正我试了很多个版本，都是没有写入权限，即无法保存修改。复制本地文件到挂载目录也会有奇怪的弹窗。 Dokan + SSHFS: https://wsgzao.github.io/post/winsshfs/ 和上一个一样，没有办法保存修改。 SFTP NET Drive: https://www.nsoftware.com/sftp/drive/download.aspx 可以像Ubuntu的sshfs和mac的FUSE一样通过文件管理浏览服务器文件系统，也可以保存修改。但是个人版只能同时连接一个服务器，商业版没有找到破解方式。 Cyberduck: https://cyberduck.io/ 比filezilla强一点，不用自己上传文件，但是也只能同时连接一个服务器。并且独立的窗口，有一些文件管理的功能无法使用，比如拖拽整个目录到sublime或者vscode。 Mountain duck: https://mountainduck.io/ 可以像sshfs和FUSE一样，除了不能使用git（Windows的文件系统的原因），虽然付费但是可以破解。

posts.title: Affy Transcript Cluster ID转换
posts.text: 我在查看GSE103380的GEO2R结果的时候发现这个数据没有gene symbol，反而是一堆我看不懂的TC开头的ID，误打误撞发现居然有个在线工具可以转，而这些TC开头的ID是Affymatrix 的 Transcript Cluster ID。 这个工具叫bioDBnet，转换速度还可以。
